ocr.text: Targeting PI3K Pathway in Lung Cancer
Table 1. IC50 of NVP-BKM120, LY294002, and NVP-BEZ235 in a panel of six lung cancer cell lines.
Figure 3. Combinations of either NVP-BKM120 and rapamycin or LY294002 and rapamycin in H2170 (left) and SW900 (right) lung
cancer cell lines. Cells were treated with descending nanomolar concentrations of the PI3K inhibitor NVP-BKM120 or LY294002, alone or combined
with 1 nM, 10 nM or 100 nM rapamycin for 72 hours and viability was measured with the Cell Titer Glo assay. The bars show viability as a percentage
of viable cells relative to untreated cells. Three separate experiments were performed and each condition was measured in three replicate wells.
PLoS ONE | www.plosone.org 7 February 2012 | Volume 7 | Issue 2 | e31331
